description: Style NoteSynthetic leather sandals combining style and durability by catwalk. Fashioned in understated hues, this open-toed pair provides style and comfort coupled with durability. These go with ethnic and casual ensembles.  Product DetailsBlack sandal with synthetic leather upper in a cut- out patterningMildly padded footbed for instep comfortRubber outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and an upraised heel with floral groove on the heelMaterial and Care  SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
